# Cancellation vs Return

Customers may place an order-cancellation at any time while the order is in order-status-processing (i.e., before dispatch). Once the order has shipped, cancellations are no longer available; customers must submit a request under the return-policy instead.

[Source: refund_policy.md#cancellation-vs-return]
